textByHashes.2c88266abfd64e923e463fc2a0e40a6ffa6e1491: You're better off speaking with the Siren, that is her area of expertise. All I know is that the beast poses a huge risk to Mother.
textByHashes.44b6559a4a414108970cb5f1e1cfd333961b9ff9: At least for the moment, Mother is not in any direct danger. I fear it is only a matter of time before the beast enters her mind again though.
textByHashes.2391eddf60d5874d9ae8b6501da4f2a2639dca84: These are the masks of the Sisterhood. While symbolic, they also have practical uses.
textByHashes.1d02775c81dfe28fb013869b1638b87794b0f7c0: Herbs can be stored within the beak, masking the smell of death and preventing us from becoming infected.
textByHashes.98e9615397c729f302532a5a507b3f4027ae8b92: No. To wear a mask of the Sisterhood, you need to join the Sisterhood.
textByHashes.6926868dd2ad6cd7f5a9f8e141f87aea80642966: I'm afraid you lack the qualities we're currently looking for. Perhaps another time.
textByHashes.3583254c8b6c867f5b95d97d8e666dc07b64ea59: Sorry, but I don't have anything for you. If I did have any of your items, but you died before collecting them, they'll now be lost.
textByHashes.9e3c8746e2a7ffadccab5c96aae12600c241f104: I do, traveller. You should be more cautious with them.
textByHashes.6f15959ae5807a030e916168b4afd54e393ac916: I would advise against doing that, traveller. You do not yet know what you are up against.
textByHashes.fb49b7f0de9833aa53a20d8feac5b9c13fa88c62: Phosani, the founder of our sect and creator of this sanctuary. She is our mother, and always will be.
textByHashes.48693605d312bbc10b3f2d64b7df2f2873fb6213: Dead? No. She sleeps the everlasting slumber.
textByHashes.188e2bc8e968fe59cb69c211a5e5ef6416ee13cd: The creature down there, the one that Siren calls the Nightmare. It has been invading Mother's mind, feeding on her.
textByHashes.5bc43e6603bd95990945f191dfa7a337475db150: Mother is strong, but not strong enough to fight it off alone. She needs help.
textByHashes.f23b317abee0a78f805efee8a4342e9645b63c70: The offer is appreciated. Luckily for us though, the Nightmare is not present in Mother's mind at the moment.
textByHashes.6a601e77d18ade4f31dec399e09d9e753e5f27fe: The offer is appreciated. I fear you do not have the abilities to take on that sort of challenge though.
textByHashes.4446c487d71657c51f416ef5bdcf86ba8a776c4c: The horror that has manifested itself in Mother's mind is far stronger than the one fought in the Nightmare's dream.
textByHashes.9a639bdd9939164d49b686565fbb68e7f617f282: If you hope to have a chance, you'll want to take on the weaker form first. That Siren down there can help you.
textByHashes.b08bc49ed9430419ffcf7645eda03b29bed89dc9: That would be appreciated, traveller. You can use the pool here to enter Mother's mind and take on the Nightmare within.
textByHashes.ce12d89aa0054840b8e8ec5e3a4a6ca612873aa8: Be warned though. If you enter, you enter alone. No one else can help you with this one.
